text:
Team USA men's basketball roster for the upcoming 2024 Paris Olympicswas officially announcedon Wednesday. It is, predictably, loaded with star power. All in all, the team boasts multiple gold medalists, NBA champions, MVPs, and countless All-NBA selections. It is a tremendous collection of talent that will double as one last run at international greatness for older stars like Stephen Curry, LeBron James, Kevin Durant and Anthony Davis.

To commemorate the momentous accomplishment of earning a spot on the team, each player was hand-delivered the jersey they'll be wearing in Paris. Grant Hill, former NBA great and the current managing director of USA Basketball, traveled around the country to knock on doors and present the country's threads.

It is excellent content and a good reminder of how much this means to these players. Especially the younger ones, like Anthony Edwards, who have never enjoyed this particular roller coaster before.

Here's Bam Adebayo's jersey presentation:

We had to bring some Heat to Paris 冒聼聰楼Welcome back@Bam1of1!冒聼聡潞冒聼聡赂#USABMNTpic.twitter.com/KMCCIHDZ8S

Then there's Jayson Tatum and Jrue Holiday, who made things easy on Hill by playing for the same team up in Boston. They were teammates once before, back in August 2021 for the Tokyo Olympics where Team USA earned gold yet again.

Along for another Olympics!Let's go get another gold@Jrue_Holiday11&@jaytatum0冒聼陇聺冒聼聡潞冒聼聡赂#USABMNTpic.twitter.com/SxuFhu5rmx

In a fun twist, Hill hid in an office for this next video while waiting for Joel Embiid to walk in. The first-time Olympian was thrilled to find Hill there.

He stays repping the red, white & blue!Welcome to the 冒聼聡潞冒聼聡赂#USABMNT@JoelEmbiid!pic.twitter.com/IH90pkGU6C

It looks like the Indiana Pacers pulled off a similar operation with Tyrese Haliburton, who will make his own Olympic debut after multiple FIBA appearances.

From Oshkosh to Paris!Let's go to the Olympics,@TyHaliburton22.冒聼聡潞冒聼聡赂#USABMNTpic.twitter.com/RS0f94KLSE

Then it was Edwards's turn. He's the strongest candidate on the roster to pull off a worthy successor to Vince Carter's dunk of death.

Olympic Ant is here 冒聼聡潞冒聼聡赂冒聼聬聹Believe That@theantedwards_!#USABMNTpic.twitter.com/FAw6G0EiW3

Kevin Durant and Devin Booker made for another easy trip for Hill as teammates on the Phoenix Suns. Both are decorated international athletes as well.

The Suns will be out in Paris.Welcome back to the Olympic stage@KDTrey5&@DevinBook.冒聼聡潞冒聼聡赂#USABMNTpic.twitter.com/xKlRF783Sp

For some reason Hill couldn't make it to the Clippers' facilities in Los Angeles, so coach Ty Lue was given the responsibility of handing over the Olympics jersey to Kawhi Leonard. This will be his first international appearance.

We couldn芒聙聶t have an Olympic team without a Fun Guy.Let芒聙聶s get to work, Kawhi!冒聼聡潞冒聼聡赂#USABMNTpic.twitter.com/0QYFyDS94I

Finally, it was LeBron and AD's turn. Hill FaceTimed in while the pair were in New Orleans with the Los Angeles Lakers for the play-in game against the New Orleans Pelicans.

It's a Showtime Summer.For the first time since 2012,@KingJames&@AntDavis23will take the court at the Olympics.冒聼聡潞冒聼聡赂#USABMNTpic.twitter.com/tvd6C79ntJ

It's always heartwarming to see dreams come true and this was no different. What a moment for these 12 men who aim to cement their names in the Olympic record books this summer.

Liam McKeone is a senior writer for the Breaking and Trending News team at Sports Illustrated. He has been in the industry as a content creator since 2017, and prior to joining SI in May 2024, McKeone worked for NBC Sports Boston and The Big Lead. In addition to his work as a writer, he has hosted the Press Pass Podcast covering sports media and The Big Stream covering pop culture. A graduate of Fordham University, he is always up for a good debate and enjoys loudly arguing about sports, rap music, books and video games. McKeone has been a member of the National Sports Media Association since 2020.

title: Videos of Team USA Men's Basketball Players Receiving Olympic Jerseys Are Great
description: Team USA men's basketball documented the moment everybody on the Paris Olympics roster received their jerseys.
